details.summary: This is an automation failure where the AI Harness system attempted to create a pull request for issue #117, but failed because a PR already exists for the target branch. The issue requires investigation of the existing PR and resolution of the conflict.
overall_approach: Investigate the existing pull request for the branch 'feat/issue-117-manual-review-required-failed-to-process-issue-115'
Determine the state of that PR
Either work with the existing PR or close it and create a new one
Improve the automation to handle duplicate PR scenarios
potential_risks: The existing PR may have unresolved merge conflicts or failing checks
Closing the existing PR may lose valuable work or context
The automation may repeatedly fail if the root cause is not addressed
There may be multiple stuck PRs creating confusion in the repository

tasks.title: Investigate existing pull request and resolve conflict
tasks.resolution: Reviewed the existing PR state and implemented conflict resolution strategy. Updated automation configuration to handle duplicate PR scenarios.

overall_approach: Investigate and resolve the duplicate PR issue, then implement safeguards to prevent future occurrences.
potential_risks: Automation may need further refinement for edge cases
Manual intervention may still be required for complex conflicts
